action_text: Click the "View / Run" module in the filtered left navigation results
rationale: The left navigation is filtered to "View / Run"; clicking the visible "View / Run" result should open the Reports > View/Run page directly.

action_text: Click the text link for "View / Run" under All Results
rationale: Another clickable target on the same "View / Run" list item; if the first selector misses, this one may succeed.

action_text: Press Enter in the left nav filter to open the highlighted "View / Run" result
rationale: The filter field is focused with "View / Run"; pressing Enter should open the highlighted first result.

action_text: Click the "Reports" application in the left navigation
rationale: If direct navigation to the module fails, expanding the Reports application will expose the "View / Run" option to click next.

action_text: Click the "Reports" item in the left nav results
rationale: Backup click on the Reports application row in case the other Reports selector is the wrong element.
